holdings.infoBox: MSOS is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are Derivatives Collateral Nomura stock at 29.21%, Derivatives Collateral Nbc at 11.85%, Derivatives Collateral Marex at 11.65%, Curaleaf Holdings at 11.55%, and Curaleaf Holdings Inc Swap at 9.48%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Pure US Cannabis ETF (MSOS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed narrow portfolio of US stocks or swap contracts related to the domestic cannabis and hemp industry. MSOS was launched on Sep 1, 2020 and is issued by AdvisorShares.
